metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_524
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Authors performed immunogold EM in synaptosomal fractions from human cortex and detected huntingtin within the postsynaptic cytoplasm.

13/6/2017 Pim
- LIteral: "Immunogold labeling of a synaptosome fraction from the human cortex demonstrates the presence of gold particles around vesicles (arrows) in a presynaptic profile and within the **matrix of the cytoplasm (small arrows) postsynaptically**.". Experimental description: From M&M: Human brain tissue from three normal control cases was obtained from the Brain Tissue Resource Center at McLean Hospital, Belmont, MA.

Antibody production:
A peptide containing residues 1-t7 of huntingtin was synthesized to greater than 95% purity on a multiple peptide synthesizer (Symphony, Rainin). Amino acid analysis was performed by high pressure liquid chromatography to verify the sequence. A tyrosine residue was added to the C-terminusof residue 17;
White New Zealand Rabbits (n = 3) were injected with a 1:1 ratio of Freund's complete adjuvant for the first injection and incomplete adjuvant for subsequent boosts at 4-6 week intervals.
